{ ASSERT(select <= 0x7FU); EALLOW; // // Write a select to the mux select bit. // HWREGH(ANALOGSUBSYS_BASE + ASYSCTL_O_CMPLNMXSEL) = select; EDIS; }

Not a valid value } EDIS; }

{ ASSERT(value <= 4U); EALLOW; // // Set the value for the appropriate Mux Select. // HWREG(ANALOGSUBSYS_BASE + ASYSCTL_O_CMPHPMXSEL) = (HWREG(ANALOGSUBSYS_BASE + ASYSCTL_O_CMPHPMXSEL) & ~((uint32_t)ASYSCTL_CMPHPMXSEL_CMP1HPMXSEL_M << (uint32_t)select)) | (value << (uint32_t)select); EDIS; }
